notes: A thin structural bridge file with 4 short theorems and no sorries. `frobeniusAlgHom_translate_commute` is the only intra-file callee (used once by `frobeniusAlgHom_translate_commute_ringHom`); the other three declarations are leaf API consumed exclusively by callers in other files (`PencilCovariance`, `WallAGeometricRealization`, `PencilComapWitnesses`, `FrobeniusGenericCovariance`). No set_option maxHeartbeats, no long proofs.
